heading: Contribution to Asian Development Fund; authorization of appropriations
label: 285w Contribution to Asian Development Fund; authorization of appropriations
notes: Effective DateSection effective , except that any funds authorized to be appropriated shall not be available for use or obligation prior to , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 13, 1981Oct. 1, 1981section 1372 of Pub. L. 97–35section 290i of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The United States Governor of the Bank is authorized to contribute on behalf of the United States $66,750,000 to the Asian Development Fund, a special fund of the Bank: , That any commitment to make such contribution shall be made subject to obtaining the necessary appropriations.Provided, however

children.label: b
children.text: In order to pay for the United States contribution to the Asian Development Fund provided for in this section, there is authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, $66,750,000 for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury: , That no funds may be made available for such contribution for the fiscal year 1982.Provided, however
